title: Web Pages Migration: web-old to web

tasks.title: Verify infrastructure readiness for migration
tasks.description: Verify all prerequisite infrastructure exists in apps/web before starting migration. Check: (1) All shared components in src/components/shared/ exist (AccommodationCard, DestinationCard, EventCard, FeaturedArticleCard, SecondaryArticleCard, ReviewCard, StatCard, SectionHeader, GradientButton, EmptyState, WaveDivider, ParallaxDivider, BackgroundPattern, DecorativeElement, Badge, CategoryBadge, LocationBadge, RatingBadge, AmenityTag, StarsDisplay). (2) All UI primitives in src/components/ui/ exist (button.tsx, calendar.tsx, drawer.tsx, Modal.client.tsx, popover.tsx, select.tsx, ThemeToggle.astro, Toast.client.tsx). (3) All lib files exist (api/client.ts, api/endpoints.ts, api/endpoints-protected.ts, api/transforms.ts, api/types.ts, i18n.ts, auth-client.ts, env.ts, cn.ts, logger.ts, media.ts, middleware-helpers.ts, sanitize-html.ts, tiptap-renderer.ts, urls.ts, page-helpers.ts, pricing-fallbacks.ts, pricing-plans.ts, owners-page-data.ts). (4) Layouts exist (BaseLayout.astro, Header.astro, Footer.astro). (5) SEO components exist. (6) Skeleton components exist. (7) Static data files exist in src/data/. Document any missing items.

tasks.title: Verify and port CSS animation classes
tasks.description: Check if apps/web/src/styles/global.css already contains the scroll-reveal animation classes from web-old (scroll-reveal, scroll-reveal-left, scroll-reveal-right, scroll-reveal-scale). Also check if animation keyframes and component CSS from web-old/src/styles/animations.css, components.css, and textures.css are covered by the new global.css or BackgroundPattern/DecorativeElement components. Port any missing CSS that is needed. Do NOT port CSS that is now handled by Tailwind utility classes or shared components.

tasks.title: Evaluate and port Pagination.astro
tasks.description: Evaluate web-old/src/components/ui/Pagination.astro (181 lines) and port to web/src/components/shared/Pagination.astro. Read the source component first and decide strategy (copy+adapt recommended). The component has two URL modes (segment /page/2/ and query ?page=2), ellipsis algorithm, responsive design (3 pages mobile, 5 desktop), prev/next buttons. Adaptation: update import path for t() from src/lib/i18n, replace color classes (bg-blue-600 to bg-primary, text-gray-500 to text-muted-foreground), apply border-radius and padding from STYLE_GUIDE. Keep same props interface.

subtasks.title: Verify i18n keys exist for es

tasks.title: Write Pagination.astro unit tests
tasks.description: Write unit tests for Pagination.astro at web/test/components/shared/pagination.test.ts. Test: ellipsis logic for various page counts (1, 5, 10, 50 pages), both URL modes (segment and query param), edge cases (page 1, last page, single page, out of bounds), responsive page count, prev/next button disabled states, correct aria attributes.

tasks.title: Evaluate and port Breadcrumb.astro
tasks.description: Evaluate web-old/src/components/ui/Breadcrumb.astro and port to web/src/components/shared/Breadcrumb.astro. Update color tokens (text-muted-foreground for separators), verify HOME_BREADCRUMB constant from lib/page-helpers, ensure chevron separator styling matches STYLE_GUIDE.

tasks.title: Write Breadcrumb.astro unit tests
tasks.description: Write unit tests for Breadcrumb.astro at web/test/components/shared/breadcrumb.test.ts. Test: renders with single item, renders with multiple items, renders HOME_BREADCRUMB, chevron separators present, last item is not a link, correct aria-label on nav element.

tasks.title: Port filter-sidebar.types.ts with destination data fix
tasks.description: Port web-old/src/components/accommodation/filter-sidebar.types.ts to web/src/components/accommodation/filter-sidebar.types.ts. FIX BUG: Replace hardcoded 5 destination names with import from src/data/destinations.ts (DESTINATION_NAMES which has 9 destinations). Update TypeScript types as needed.

tasks.title: Evaluate and port FilterSection.client.tsx
tasks.description: Evaluate web-old/src/components/accommodation/FilterSection.client.tsx and port to web/src/components/accommodation/FilterSection.client.tsx. Sub-component of FilterSidebar. Read source, decide strategy. Update useTranslation hook import, @repo/icons imports, color tokens to semantic.

tasks.title: Evaluate and port PriceRangeFilter.client.tsx
tasks.description: Evaluate web-old/src/components/accommodation/PriceRangeFilter.client.tsx and port to web/src/components/accommodation/PriceRangeFilter.client.tsx. Sub-component of FilterSidebar. Read source, decide strategy. Update useTranslation hook import, color tokens to semantic. Check if range slider needs custom styling.

tasks.title: Evaluate and port ActiveFilterChips.client.tsx
tasks.description: Evaluate web-old/src/components/accommodation/ActiveFilterChips.client.tsx and port. Sub-component of FilterSidebar showing active filter chips with remove buttons. Update useTranslation, color tokens.

tasks.title: Evaluate and port FilterSidebar.client.tsx
tasks.description: Evaluate web-old/src/components/accommodation/FilterSidebar.client.tsx (385 lines, complex) and port. Main filter component composing FilterSection, PriceRangeFilter, ActiveFilterChips. Update: useTranslation, @repo/icons, replace hardcoded DESTINATIONS with DESTINATION_NAMES from data, color tokens, URL sync with window.history.pushState stays the same.

subtasks.title: Port with all sub-component imports updated

tasks.title: Write FilterSidebar system tests
tasks.description: Write tests for FilterSidebar system at web/test/components/accommodation/filter-sidebar.test.tsx. Port and adapt existing tests from web-old. Test: renders all filter sections, price range interaction, active filter chips display/removal, URL sync, destination filter uses 9 destinations (not 5), filter reset.

tasks.title: Evaluate and port ImageGallery.client.tsx
tasks.description: Evaluate web-old/src/components/ui/ImageGallery.client.tsx (281 lines) and port to web/src/components/shared/ImageGallery.client.tsx. Features: main image + thumbnail strip + fullscreen lightbox, keyboard navigation. Clean component. Update: useTranslation import, @repo/icons (CloseIcon, NextIcon, PreviousIcon), border-radius and shadow tokens from STYLE_GUIDE.

tasks.title: Write ImageGallery tests
tasks.description: Write tests at web/test/components/shared/image-gallery.test.tsx. Test: renders main image, thumbnails, thumbnail click changes main, fullscreen lightbox opens/closes, keyboard navigation (Escape, arrows), empty images, single image.

tasks.title: Evaluate and port FavoriteButton system
tasks.description: Evaluate and port web-old FavoriteButton.client.tsx (285 lines) + FavoriteButtonIsland.astro to web/src/components/shared/. Complex: heart toggle, optimistic updates, auth check, API calls, Sentry, toast. Update imports: @sentry/astro, toast-store, lib/env. Verify AuthRequiredPopover exists in web/src/components/auth/. Verify userBookmarksApi endpoints.

tasks.title: Write FavoriteButton system tests
tasks.description: Write tests at web/test/components/shared/favorite-button.test.tsx. Test: renders heart icon, toggle state (optimistic), auth popover when not logged in, API call, Sentry error handling, toast on success, loading state.

tasks.title: Evaluate and port ShareButtons.client.tsx
tasks.description: Evaluate web-old ShareButtons.client.tsx (219 lines) and port to web/src/components/shared/. Features: Native Web Share API (mobile) with fallback to WhatsApp/Facebook/X, copy to clipboard. Update: icon imports, logger import, color tokens.

tasks.title: Write ShareButtons tests
tasks.description: Write tests at web/test/components/shared/share-buttons.test.tsx. Test: renders share buttons, copy to clipboard, Web Share API detection and fallback, correct URLs per platform.

tasks.title: Evaluate and port ReviewList.client.tsx + ReviewListIsland.astro
tasks.description: Evaluate web-old ReviewList.client.tsx (314 lines) + ReviewListIsland.astro and port to web/src/components/review/. ReviewCard.astro already exists in shared/ - decide reuse approach. Update: icon imports, formatDate from @repo/i18n, useTranslation.

tasks.title: Evaluate and port ReviewForm.client.tsx
tasks.description: Evaluate web-old ReviewForm.client.tsx (323 lines) and port to web/src/components/review/. Decision: React Hook Form + Zod (project pattern) vs manual validation. Update: icon imports, useTranslation, color tokens. Check star rating input. NOTE: ReviewForm submit will be a placeholder (console.log or toast) during this migration. The form UI should be complete and validated, but actual submission is deferred.

tasks.title: Write Review system tests
tasks.description: Write tests for ReviewList and ReviewForm at web/test/components/review/. Test ReviewList: renders cards, pagination, empty state, loading. Test ReviewForm: renders fields, star rating, validation, submission with mock API, error handling.

tasks.title: Evaluate and port SearchBar.client.tsx
tasks.description: Evaluate web-old SearchBar.client.tsx (183 lines) and port to web/src/components/search/. Simple: text input with 300ms debounce, clear button, navigates to /busqueda/?q=. Update: icon imports, useTranslation, color tokens.

tasks.description: Write tests at web/test/components/search/search-bar.test.tsx. Test: renders input, debounce (300ms), clear button, navigation to /busqueda/?q=query, empty query handling.

tasks.title: Create 404 error page
tasks.description: Create web/src/pages/404.astro. Recreate (not port). SSR (no prerender) with locale detection from URL path, then Accept-Language header, fallback es. Use BaseLayout with noindex: true. Custom SVG illustration (nature/river theme). i18n keys: error.404.title, error.404.description, error.404.heading, error.404.message, error.404.goHome. Link to /${locale}/ (home). Apply STYLE_GUIDE section spacing and typography. No decorative patterns. Reference: web-old/src/pages/404.astro (107 lines).

tasks.title: Create 500 error page
tasks.description: Create web/src/pages/500.astro. Same structure as 404 but with retry button (window.location.reload()). i18n keys: error.500.*. Two CTAs: Retry + Go Home. Reference: web-old/src/pages/500.astro (126 lines).

tasks.title: Write error pages tests
tasks.description: Write tests for 404 and 500 pages at web/test/pages/error-pages.test.ts. Port existing tests. Test: 404 renders, home link, 500 has retry, locale detection, noindex meta tag.

tasks.title: Create accommodation list page
tasks.description: Create web/src/pages/[lang]/alojamientos/index.astro. Copy+Adapt from web-old (271 lines). SSR (prerender=false). Features: 11 filters, 5 sort options via SORT_MAP, FilterChipsBar React island (client:idle), responsive grid (1/2/3 columns), pagination with filter preservation, empty state, error state. API: accommodationsApi.list(). Components: Breadcrumb, EmptyState, Pagination, AccommodationCard, SortDropdown, FilterSidebar. Theming: bg-background, bg-muted/30 for sidebar, pattern-dots, 2-3 decoratives. IMPORTANT: As part of this task, create a shared `_AccommodationListLayout.astro` partial that contains all list page logic (filters, grid, pagination). The variant pages (T-062, T-063, T-064) will be thin wrappers importing this layout.

subtasks.title: Copy and adapt page from web-old

tasks.title: Write accommodation list page tests
tasks.description: Write tests at web/test/pages/accommodations/list.test.ts. Test: renders with mock data, filter application, sort options, pagination, empty state, error state, breadcrumb, SEO tags.

tasks.title: Create accommodation detail page
tasks.description: Create web/src/pages/[lang]/alojamientos/[slug].astro. Copy+Adapt from web-old (310 lines). SSG with getStaticPaths + on-demand fallback. SUBDIVIDE into 3 logical sections: (A) Base structure + hero/gallery: page layout, ImageGallery (client:visible), hero image, sticky sidebar with price/check-in/CTA. (B) Interactive sections: ReviewListIsland (server:defer), FavoriteButton (server:defer), ShareButtons, MapView (client:visible), similar accommodations grid (4 cards). (C) SEO/metadata: JSON-LD LodgingBusiness, breadcrumb, view transitions, TipTap content rendering + HTML sanitization, amenities list, FAQ accordion.

tasks.description: Create web/src/pages/[lang]/alojamientos/tipo/[type]/page/[page].astro. Uses shared `_AccommodationListLayout.astro` partial. Thin wrapper passing both type filter and page from URL. SSR.

Theming: bg-secondary for hero, pattern-diagonal, 2-3 decoratives.

tasks.title: Write destination list page tests

tasks.title: Create destination detail page
tasks.description: Create web/src/pages/[lang]/destinos/[...path].astro. Copy+Adapt from web-old (459 lines, MOST COMPLEX). Catch-all route for hierarchy. SSG with getStaticPaths + fallback. SUBDIVIDE into 3 logical sections: (A) Base structure + hero: page layout, hero with destination info, dynamic breadcrumb from API. (B) Interactive/data sections: accommodations preview grid (6 cards), events preview with client-side city filtering, ImageGallery, MapView, ShareButtons, FavoriteButtonIsland. (C) SEO/metadata: JSON-LD Place, climate section (4 conditional fields), tPlural usage, view transitions. Known issue: fetches ALL events (pageSize: 100) for client-side filtering.

Theming: pattern-grid at low opacity.

tasks.description: Write tests at web/test/pages/search.test.ts. Test: renders with results from 4 entities, empty state (no query), empty state (no results), error state, popular searches, view-all links, noindex.

tasks.title: Create contact page

ContactForm island (client:visible). Hardcoded email, social links, office hours from i18n. Theming: info page with pattern-waves, 2-3 decoratives, 1 illustration.

tasks.title: Write contact page tests
tasks.description: Write tests at web/test/pages/contact.test.ts. Test: two-column layout, contact form, email, social links, office hours, breadcrumb, SEO.

PricingCard with highlighted prop. 3 FAQ items from i18n. BreadcrumbList JSON-LD. CTA to registration. Theming: marketing page, gradient background for highlighted.

Owner plans fetched via plansApi.list() with owner-specific filter, fallback from lib/pricing-fallbacks.ts. PricingCard components with highlighted prop. FAQ section using AccordionFAQ with owner-specific FAQ items from i18n. CTA toward owner registration/contact. BreadcrumbList JSON-LD. Components: Container, Section, Breadcrumb, PricingCard, AccordionFAQ, JsonLd.

tasks.title: Write pricing pages tests
tasks.description: Write tests at web/test/pages/pricing.test.ts. Test: plan cards render, highlighted styling, FAQ, CTA link, JSON-LD valid, fallback data, SEO.

tasks.title: Create benefits page with CTA fix

All content static from i18n keys under about.* namespace. No API calls.

tasks.description: Write tests at web/test/pages/marketing/. Benefits: tourist/owner benefits, CTA links correct, icons. About: all sections, CTA. Owners: data from owners-page-data, FAQ, JSON-LD valid, step numbers.

tasks.title: Create terms and conditions page

Same structure as privacy page (T-103): sections of hardcoded Spanish legal text. Uses Tailwind prose prose-lg for typography. Dynamic 'last updated' date. Content is NOT internationalized (Spanish only). Update layout imports, apply semantic color tokens, use new Container/Section. i18n namespace: terms (title and description keys only).

tasks.title: Write legal pages tests
tasks.description: Write tests at web/test/pages/legal/. Privacy: 7 sections, prose, last updated. Terms: same structure. Sitemap: 7 link sections, correct routes (verify bug fix), 3-column grid.

subtasks.title: Write sitemap tests with link verification

tasks.title: Run full regression test suite
tasks.description: Run complete test suite for apps/web: pnpm typecheck, pnpm lint, pnpm test. Fix any failures. Ensure minimum 90% coverage. Verify all migrated components and pages have tests.

tasks.title: Cross-viewport and dark mode visual verification
tasks.description: Visually verify ALL migrated pages using Playwright screenshots in 3 viewports (375px mobile, 768px tablet, 1440px desktop). Checklist per page: layout correct at all viewports, no horizontal scrolling, typography hierarchy correct, decorative elements render without overlap, dark mode toggle works with all elements visible, images load with correct aspect ratios, cards have consistent styling, buttons/links visually distinct. Also verify dark mode: all text readable (contrast >= 4.5:1), no white/light backgrounds (all semantic tokens), cards have visible borders/shadows, form inputs have visible borders, active/focus states visible.

subtasks.title: Check dark mode across all viewports

tasks.title: Create useTranslation hook for React islands
tasks.description: Create src/hooks/useTranslation.ts as a wrapper hook over createT/createTranslations from src/lib/i18n.ts. This hook does NOT exist in apps/web yet but is needed by ALL React islands that use translations. The old web had this hook; the new web does not. Implementation: export function useTranslation that takes a namespace and returns t() function. Must work with @repo/i18n locale detection.

tasks.title: Create apps/web/CLAUDE.md
tasks.description: Create apps/web/CLAUDE.md adapted for the new web app. Base on web-old/CLAUDE.md but update for new architecture: Tailwind CSS v4 semantic tokens, Shadcn/Radix UI primitives, shared components in src/components/shared/, API layer in src/lib/api/, new i18n pattern with createT, BaseLayout/Header/Footer, SEO components, Server Islands support. Document key patterns, file structure, and conventions specific to apps/web.

tasks.title: Verify and enable experimental.serverIslands in astro.config
tasks.description: Verify that apps/web/astro.config.mjs has experimental.serverIslands: true enabled. This is required for server:defer directives used by FavoriteButton and ReviewList islands. Also verify any other config differences between web-old and web astro configs (integrations, vite config, etc.) and port missing configs.

tasks.title: Port FilterChipsBar.client.tsx
tasks.description: Port web-old/src/components/accommodation/FilterChipsBar.client.tsx to web/src/components/accommodation/. Sub-component used by accommodation list page to show active filter chips inline. Update: useTranslation hook, color tokens to semantic, @repo/icons imports.

tasks.title: Port NavigationProgress.astro
tasks.description: Port web-old/src/components/ui/NavigationProgress.astro to web/src/components/shared/NavigationProgress.astro. Add to BaseLayout.astro. This shows a progress bar during page navigation. Update color tokens to semantic (use bg-primary for the bar).

tasks.title: Port Tabs.client.tsx
tasks.description: Port web-old/src/components/ui/Tabs.client.tsx to web/src/components/shared/Tabs.client.tsx. Needed for Account pages (UserFavoritesList, UserReviewsList use tabs). Update: useTranslation hook, color tokens, @repo/icons.

tasks.title: Port DestinationCarousel.astro + utils
tasks.description: Port web-old/src/components/destination/DestinationCarousel.astro and destination-carousel.utils.ts to web/src/components/destination/. Carousel for destination cards. Update: color tokens, use DestinationCard from shared/.

tasks.title: Port DestinationPreview.astro + utils
tasks.description: Port web-old/src/components/destination/DestinationPreview.astro and destination-preview.utils.ts to web/src/components/destination/. Preview component used in destination detail page. Update: color tokens, imports.

tasks.title: Port CounterAnimation.client.tsx + useCountUp hook
tasks.description: Port web-old/src/components/content/CounterAnimation.client.tsx and web-old/src/hooks/useCountUp.ts to web/src/components/shared/ and web/src/hooks/. Animated stat counters used in marketing pages (benefits, about). Update: useTranslation if needed, color tokens.

tasks.title: Create format-utils.ts utility
tasks.description: Create src/lib/format-utils.ts with generic formatting functions used across cards and pages: formatPrice({amount, currency, locale}) returns '$12.500', formatLocationDisplay({city, state}) returns 'City, State', formatRating({rating}) returns '4.6', buildDetailUrl({locale, slug, type}) returns '/es/alojamientos/slug/', formatDate({date, locale, format}) returns '15 de enero 2024', formatReadingTime({minutes, locale}) returns '5 min'. After creating, refactor existing card components (AccommodationCard, DestinationCard, EventCard, etc.) to use these shared functions. Write comprehensive unit tests.

subtasks.title: Write unit tests for each function
Refactor existing cards to use shared functions
